text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Japanese Derby fast approaching,
Mejiro Ardan commits to her training with
newfound intensity, only to end up pushing
herself to the brink of collapse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She holds an unwavering belief that, as she is
now, she cannot possibly win against Sakura
Chiyono O or Yaeno Muteki at the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan yearns to overcome the limits of her
current self in the hopes of defeating her two
rivals and fulfilling her dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I steel my resolve to help Mejiro Ardan push
herself as hard as possible, but without forgetting
my duty as her trainer to ensure she doesn't go
too far.
